entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of the amount of crop produced per unit area of land in rainfed agriculture

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a crop uses water to produce biomass or yield

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where more than 95% of the farm land is rainfed

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: Region where almost 90% of the farm land is rainfed

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where about 60% of the farm land is rainfed

entities.name: EAST ASIA
entities.description: Region where 65% of the farm land is rainfed

entities.name: NEAR EAST AND NORTH AFRICA
entities.description: Region where 75% of the farm land is rainfed

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where 66% of 142 million ha arable land is rainfed

relationships.description: Rainfed agriculture aims to increase crop productivity

Prevalent in Near East and North Africa
